$comment: GitHub Code Search queries used by /atlas-component-crawler. Each query targets a specific class of SDF function. Order matters — earlier queries are higher-priority. Run via `gh api search/code -f q='<query>' -F per_page=5`. The crawler tries queries one at a time, gathering hits, deduping against seen-cache.

queries.rationale: Broadest net for SDF primitive functions. Yields IQ-style sd<Name>(vec3 p, ...) signatures.

queries.q: sdTree OR sdLeaf OR sdBranch vec3 language:GLSL

queries.rationale: Cloud SDF candidates (may need to skip if uses raymarching density).

queries.q: sdMountain OR terrain vec3 language:GLSL extension:glsl
queries.rationale: Terrain / mountain SDFs (often heightmap-based — judge carefully).

queries.q: sdHeart OR sdStar OR sdMoon vec3 language:GLSL

queries.rationale: Canonical IQ article mirrors / Atlas-relevant copies.
